rootFurther.paragraph1: In the face of the AI era's whirlwind of change and the ever-rising demands of customers, Sun* has chosen a strategy of diversifying its capabilities — striving not only to become the elite of its own field, but also to reach for a higher goal, where every Sunner is a “problem-solver”: an expert at resolving every issue and finding answers to every challenge facing our projects, our customers and society. Inspired by this diversity of capability, the ability to grow flexibly, and the spirit of digging deeper to break through in the AI era, “Root Further” was chosen as the official theme of the Sun* Annual Awards 2025. Beyond its surface meaning, “Root Further” is the journey on which we never stop reaching farther and rooting deeper — touching the hidden “geological” layers so we can keep surviving, rising, and nurturing the Sun* people's ever-burning passion for creating value. Like a root system that keeps driving deep into the earth, powerfully weaving through each layer of “sediment” to absorb what is most precious, Sun* people are likewise “absorbing” nutrients from the era and the challenges of the market to renew themselves every day, expand their capabilities, and firmly “take root” in the AI era — a wholly new “geological” layer, complex and unpredictable, yet brimming with boundless potential and opportunity.
rootFurther.quoteLine: “A tree with deep roots fears no storm”
rootFurther.paragraph2: In the face of a storm, only trees with strong enough roots can stand firm. An organization made up of individuals who are confident in their diverse capabilities, ready to create and embrace challenges, and in command of change is one that not only stays steady amid turbulence, but also harnesses every advantage and conquers the challenges of the times. More than just the name of a new chapter in our organization's growth, “Root Further” is also a rallying call, encouraging each of us to dare to believe in ourselves, dare to dig deep, unlock all of our potential, dare to break our limits, and dare to become the most versatile and outstanding version of ourselves. Because in the AI era, a diversity of capabilities and harnessing the power of the times are the prerequisites for lasting endurance. No one can foresee how many mysterious “geological” layers still lie hidden deep in the “earth” of the modern technology industry and market. We know only that once “Root Further” has become a rooted spirit, we will feel no fear — but rather growing excitement before any uncharted territory on the journey forward. For we always believe that within those very boundless realms lie countless wonders and opportunities to rise, waiting for us.

topTalent.description: Honoring the top individuals excelling in every aspect

topProject.description: Honoring outstanding projects with notable revenue across all aspects

kudos.label: Recognition Movement
kudos.title: Sun* Kudos
kudos.detail:
WHAT'S NEW IN SAA 2025
A colleague recognition and appreciation activity — held for the first time for all Sunners. Launching in November 2025, it encourages Sun* people to share words of recognition and thanks for colleagues on the system announced by the organizers. This will serve as reference material for the Heads Council during the award selection process.

topTalent.title: Top Talent
topTalent.description: The Top Talent award honors all-round outstanding individuals – those who continuously demonstrate strong professional competence, superior work performance, consistently deliver value beyond expectations, and are highly regarded by clients and teammates. With a spirit of readiness to take on any mission entrusted by the organization, they are a constant source of inspiration, driving motivation and creating a positive impact on the entire team.

topProject.title: Top Project
topProject.description: The Top Project award honors outstanding project teams with business results that exceed expectations, optimal operational efficiency, and a dedicated work ethic. These are projects with high technical complexity, excellent resource and cost optimization, valuable ideas proposed to clients, superior profitability, and positive client feedback. Team members strictly adhere to internal development standards throughout the project, setting a benchmark for excellence and professionalism.

topProjectLeader.title: Top Project Leader
topProjectLeader.description: The Top Project Leader award honors outstanding project managers – those who combine strong management capabilities, powerful inspirational ability, and an 'Aim High – Be Agile' mindset in every challenge and context. Under their leadership, team members not only overcome challenges and achieve set goals together, but also keep the flame of enthusiasm alive, maintain the Wasshoi spirit, and grow to become a more refined and happier version of themselves.

bestManager.title: Best Manager
bestManager.description: The Best Manager award honors exemplary leaders – those who have guided their teams to produce results that exceed expectations, with notable impact on business efficiency and sustainable organizational growth. Under their leadership, the team consistently conquers and masters every goal through multitasking ability, effective collaboration, and flexible technology application in the digital age. They inspire the team to become confident and energetic, ready to embrace and even lead revolutionary changes.

signatureCreator.title: Signature 2025 - Creator
signatureCreator.description: The Signature award honors individuals or teams who embody the distinctive spirit that Sun* aspires to in each era. In 2025, the Signature award honors Creators – individuals/teams with a proactive and sharp mindset who always see opportunity in challenges and pioneer action. They are perceptive about problems, quickly identifying and proposing practical solutions that bring clear value to projects, clients, or the organization. With a creative mindset and Sun*'s distinctive 'Creator' spirit, they not only respond positively to change but proactively create improvements, helping to define new standards for the way Sun* people create value.

mvp.title: MVP (Most Valuable Person)
mvp.description: The MVP award honors the most outstanding individual of the year – the exemplary face representing the entire Sun* collective. They have demonstrated superior capabilities, enduring dedication, and far-reaching influence, leaving a powerful mark on Sun*'s journey throughout the year. Not only outstanding for their performance and work results, they are also a source of spreading inspiration – through their thoughts, actions, and positive influence on the team. The MVP embodies all the qualities of an excellent Sun* person, while carrying the great responsibility of becoming the representative model of Sun*'s people and spirit, helping to lead the team toward new heights.
